architectural-exterior.promptPrefix: Ultra-photorealistic architectural exterior photograph of a luxury hospitality property, award-winning architectural photography, golden hour lighting, perfect exposure, sharp facade detail, manicured landscaping, no people
architectural-exterior.promptSuffix: shot on Phase One IQ4, Architectural Digest quality, HDR, pristine composition

interior-design.promptPrefix: Ultra-photorealistic luxury hospitality interior photography, 5-star boutique hotel quality, natural window light flooding the space, premium materials, bespoke furnishings, immaculate styling
interior-design.promptSuffix: shot on Canon EOS R5, Architectural Digest interior editorial, 8K ultra-sharp, warm ambient lighting

renovation-concept.promptPrefix: Luxury boutique hotel renovation, premium finishes, contemporary design
renovation-concept.promptSuffix: professional interior design concept, high-end materials, architectural visualization quality

params.negative_prompt: lowres, watermark, banner, text, deformed, blurry, out of focus, surreal, ugly, cheap, low quality

photo-upscale.promptPrefix: luxury real estate photography, sharp detail, photorealistic, high resolution

virtual-staging.promptPrefix: Virtually staged luxury real estate interior, tastefully furnished and decorated, professional home staging photography, lifestyle-ready space
virtual-staging.promptSuffix: premium designer furniture, artfully curated decor, soft natural lighting, staged for discerning buyers, 8K

photo-to-render.promptPrefix: Photorealistic luxury architectural visualization render, exact same furniture arrangement and spatial layout as the source photo, CGI-quality lighting and materials, Unreal Engine 5 realism
photo-to-render.promptSuffix: preserve all furniture positions and room composition, Architectural Digest editorial quality, ultra-sharp detail, premium render

params.negative_prompt: lowres, watermark, banner, text, deformed, blurry, out of focus, surreal, ugly, cheap, low quality, different layout, moved furniture
